name: Key Vault soft delete not enabled
description: Key Vault soft delete is not enabled. Without soft delete, keys, secrets, and certificates deleted from the vault are permanently destroyed immediately — causing irreversible data loss and cryptographic outages.
remediation: Enable soft delete with a minimum retention of 90 days. As of Azure SDK 4.0, soft delete is always-on for new vaults. For existing vaults: az keyvault update --name <vault> --enable-soft-delete true. Combine with purge protection.
